rulings.Case Title: JEREMIAH CASEY VS. 1875 MISSION STREET PARTNERS, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Cross-Defendant Jeremiah Casey'S Demurrer To First Amended Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 21, 2017 line 1. Cross-Defendant Jeremiah Casey'S Demurrer To First Amended Cross-Complaint sustained with leave to amend as to the cause of action for fraudulent misrepresentation for Cross-Complainants to (1) allege facts supporting each element of fraud independent of breach of contract claim; (2) allege facts supporting a causal relationship between the reliance alleged in paragraph 32 and the damages alleged in paragraph 33; (3) allege facts, not conclusions, re: inability to have made earlier discovery despite reasonable diligence. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CARLOS MARTIN DOMINGUEZ ET AL VS. PETER D. BRATIS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 21, 2017 line 2. CROSS DEFENDANTs CARLOS DOMINGUEZ, CAROLINA GONGORA, and MARIA HERNANDEZ's MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, per request of the moving party.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CARLOS MARTIN DOMINGUEZ ET AL VS. PETER D. BRATIS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 21, 2017 line 2. CROSS DEFENDANTs ROLLING STOCK, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION and ADAM HASSETT's DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT OVERRULED in part and SUSTAINED in part with leave to amend. All causes of action sounding in negligence are sufficiently alleged. However, Cross-Complainant shall re-plead negligence per se as a part of cause of action for Negligence. Therefore, demurrer to causes of action sounding in negligence is overruled, except for the cause of action for Negligence per se, which shall be re-pled as part of the Negligence cause of action. Demurrer to intentional tort causes of action is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts to support each element of each cause of action.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CARLOS MARTIN DOMINGUEZ ET AL VS. PETER D. BRATIS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 21, 2017 line 2. CROSS DEFENDANTs ROLLING STOCK, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION and ADAM HASSETT's Motion To Strike DENIED in part and GRANTED in part. Striking inconsistent references to ROLLING STOCK, INC.'s business is unnecessary. Request for attorney's fees is stricken with leave to amend for Cross-Complainant to allege facts giving rise to the request for attorney's fees. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CARLOS MARTIN DOMINGUEZ ET AL VS. PETER D. BRATIS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 21, 2017 line 2. CROSS DEFENDANTs CARLOS DOMINGUEZ, CAROLINA GONGORA, and MARIA HERNANDEZ's DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, per request of the moving party.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ROLFE HOLDINGS LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. LISA ROSE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File A First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 21, 2017 line 3. PLAINTIFF ROLFE HOLDINGS LLC's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File A First Amended Complaint GRANTED. No opposition filed. First Amended Complaint to be filed and served forthwith. Moving party prepare order.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RIPTIDE LLC ET AL VS. EIZA AZAR ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 21, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANTs EIZA AZAR and MARIAN AZAR's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT DENIED. First Amended Complaint alleges sufficient facts re: malice.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RIPTIDE LLC ET AL VS. EIZA AZAR ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 21, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANTs EIZA AZAR and MARIAN AZAR's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiffs to allege facts that their relationship with the third party has a probable future economic benefit. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YOOK C. LEE VS. DANIEL L. MORALES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 21, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANTs ROB MOREIRA, RICH MOREIRA, and DAN MORALES's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint DENIED, 5 days to respond.= (501/REQ)
